description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-format-date

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-format-date/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `validate_usage`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens for typography if any. Minimal visual footprint expected.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. datetime attribute for machine-readable. Screen reader friendly output.
3. **Functionality** — Date formatting (Intl.DateTimeFormat). Locale support. Relative time. Custom format strings. ISO input. Timezone handling.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`. Date/Intl types.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Inline element. Minimal styling. Inherits parent typography.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All format options documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Formats. Locales. Relative time. Edge cases (invalid date).
8. **Storybook** — Various formats. Locales. Relative time. Live updating.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Date field output. Twig date filter replacement.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. No external date lib (uses Intl).

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-format-date
